sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`First Name`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Last Name`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Phone Number Business`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Corporate ID`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Support Organization Requestor`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Support Group Name Requester`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`InstanceId`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Region`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Site Group`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Site`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Status`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Invesitgation Status Reason`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Impact`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Urgency`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Priority`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Priority Weight`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Driver`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Target Resolution Date`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Detailed Decription`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`RootRequestName`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Reproduceable Flag`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 1`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 2`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Product Categorization Tier 3`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Product Name`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Product Model/Version`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Manufacturer`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 1`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 2`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Categorization Tier 3`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`First Reported On`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Known Error Created Date`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Support Company Pblm Mgr` AS Coordinator_Company,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Support Organization Pblm Mgr` AS Coordinator_Organization,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` AS Coordinator_Group,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assignee Pblm Mgr` AS Problem_Coordinator
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Support Company`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Support Organization`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assignee`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Vendor Name`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Vendor Contact`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Vendor Phone`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assign To Vendor`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Vendor Ticket Number`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Vendor Responded On`,
`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Reported to Vendor`
FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`
WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Known Error ID`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`TicketType`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Description`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Support Company Pblm Mgr`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Support Organization Pblm Mgr`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Region`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Known Error Status`,
`PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Stastus_Reason`
FROM `PBM:Known_Error_Associations_Archive`
inner join `PBM:Known_Error_Archive`
ON `PBM:Known_Error_Associations_Archive`.`Request ID02` = `PBM:Known_Error_Archive`.`Known Error ID`
WHERE `PBM:Known_Error_Associations_Archive`.`Request ID01` in ($PBI_ID)

SELECT DISTINCT
          TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.`Task ID` AS `TaskID`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskType AS `TaskType`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.TaskName AS `TaskName`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Status AS `Status`
         ,TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.Sequence AS `Sequence`
 
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` Problem_Investigation_Archive LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`TMS:Task_Archive` TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE
     ON ( Problem_Investigation_Archive.`Problem Investigation ID` = TMS_TASK_ARCHIVE.RootRequestID )
    WHERE Problem_Investigation_Archive.`Problem Investigation ID` = ${PBI_ID}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000"}
list.label: Company
list.name: Company
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` is not null then `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` else 'Unknown' end from `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}
list.label: Assigned Group
list.name: AssignedGroup
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` is not null then `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` else 'Unknown' end from `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` is not null then `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` else 'Unknown' end from `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}
list.label: Coordinator Group
list.name: CoordinatorGroup
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` is not null then `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` else 'Unknown' end from `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Status` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000"}
list.label: Status
list.name: Status
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Status` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive` WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`  WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` in ($CoordinatorGroup) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Status` in ($Status) LIMIT 10"}
list.label: Problem ID
list.name: PBI_ID
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Problem Investigation ID` FROM `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`  WHERE `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` in ($CoordinatorGroup) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Company` in ($Company) and `PBM:Problem_Investigation_Archive`.`Investigation Status` in ($Status) LIMIT 10"}
